content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Guarded plan-derived `planned_elsewhere` enrichment in `src/cli/project.rs` so shared-acceptance and plan-summary lookups only run when bead-plan membership is confirmed, preventing renamed/title-fallback beads from inheriting unrelated milestone-plan context. Added focused unit and CLI regressions covering the reproduced renamed-live-bead shared-acceptance case and verified the fix with targeted formatting and tests.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspected `build_planned_elsewhere_context` and the existing title-fallback regressions to confirm that shared-acceptance and proposal-summary enrichment still ran before the unconfirmed-membership gate.
2. [Completed] Patched `src/cli/project.rs` so plan-derived planned-elsewhere enrichment is skipped unless `ResolvedBeadPlan.membership_confirmed` is true, while preserving direct dependent context and deterministic ordering.
3. [Completed] Added a unit regression for the renamed-live-bead/shared-acceptance scenario and an end-to-end CLI regression proving `prompt.md` omits the stale planned-elsewhere item when membership is unconfirmed.
4. [Completed] Ran formatting and focused Rust test coverage for the touched prompt-generation and create-from-bead paths.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --all` passed.
- `cargo test build_planned_elsewhere_context_ --lib -- --nocapture` passed (8 tests), including `build_planned_elsewhere_context_skips_shared_acceptance_owners_when_membership_is_unconfirmed`.
- `cargo test project_create_from_bead_skips_shared_acceptance_owners_when_membership_is_unconfirmed --test cli -- --nocapture` passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- Validation was focused on the amended planned-elsewhere prompt-generation paths; I did not rerun the full repository test suite or `br lint` because backlog data was unchanged.
- The unrelated untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory remains in the worktree and was left untouched.
